text:
Created attachment 250100
Update patch complete

This group was on the portscout list of outdated, unmaintained ports: https://portscout.freebsd.org/ports@freebsd.org.html . I've built and tested all of them with poudriere and make stage but haven't tested the apps thoroughly to make sure they work as intended due to not being a user of said apps.

Feedback welcomed
